TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-election_lahi_ a taro_ babay

S.FORM: o: baki' So'o mwa:i' ila hini' kala minayti' koza ila kin honaehnge.
S.TRANSL: 先生，你來他們這兒已經多久了？
Sir, how long have you been here?

S.FORM: yo mwa:i' rini' 'am SayboSi: 'ilaS sizaeh.
S.TRANSL: 唷，我來這裡已經有六個月了。
I've been here six months already.

S.FORM: a SayboSi: 'ilas ma hoenaehnge ila ka 'am samsah ila.
S.TRANSL: 啊，六個月喔，也滿久了。
Ah, six months already. It's been a long time.

S.FORM: a mwa:i' hini kala minayti' niSo' kano' patawawen.
S.TRANSL: 那＝你來他們這裡，你做什麼事啊？
What do you do here?

S.FORM: o: matawaw maelahaeng ka span ka wa'ae' tabo sapeh o: ma' 'ima kikoso'.
S.TRANSL: 喔，我照顧養的鹿啊，餵它們吃東西啊，打掃啊，喔還有，除草啊。
I feed the deer, sweep the place, and do the weeding too.

S.FORM: a koza' kasinpanan kin 'akoy.
S.TRANSL: 啊，那你們養很多嗎？
How many (animals) do you raise?

S.FORM: sinpanan kinaroSa'an e mato:ol.
S.TRANSL: 養在兩個地方，總共有三十隻。
They are kept in two places, thirty in all.

S.FORM: mato:ol e piza' sinraehoe' hiza koSa'en ka wa'ae'.
S.TRANSL: 三十喔。那鹿總共有幾種啊？
How many species are there?

S.FORM: to:o' sinraehoe' to:o' sinraehoe' 'aehae' koSa'en kasakiray bangol ka wa'ae'.
S.TRANSL: 喔三個，三個種類。一種是野鹿。
Three. One is wild.

S.FORM: e 'aehae' naehaen sinkano'on.
S.TRANSL: 另外一種是叫做什麼來的。
There is one more wachamaccalit.

S.FORM: 'ihi' mita' noka SaiSiyat yao kik sekela o: koSa'en inak'inoan wa'a'.
S.TRANSL: 喔，我們賽夏人不知道怎麼叫那種鹿。
We don't know how to call it.

S.FORM: ah noka 'inaray roSa' sinraehoe 'inaray babih.
S.TRANSL: 另外兩個種類是來自別的地方。
Two species are from other places.

S.FORM: ah inaray kabih no(ka) wasal.
S.TRANSL: 啊，是從國外來的。
Ah, from overseas.

S.FORM: ai hiza ra 'a wa'ae' 'aehae' sinraehoe koSa'en kasikiray bangol.
S.TRANSL: 是的，那一種鹿是野鹿。
Right. That is wild deer.

S.FORM: e 'aehae' sinraehoe' mita' ma' 'oka' ka kapnabih ila.
S.TRANSL: 這種鹿我們沒有名稱。
This species we do not have a name for it.

S.FORM: mita' ma' koSa: wa'ae' wa'ae' saboeh sinraehoe' 'oka' ila o:.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有名稱，我們都叫做鹿。
We do not have names. We call all of them deer. No names.

S.FORM: isaa 'aehae' may'isa:a rpa nakhini oSa'en.
S.TRANSL: 那一隻經過那裡就加入那一群的。
That one passed by there and joined the herd.

S.FORM: kama langoy ray ralom wa'ae' hinghae' ila ki yabaka'.
S.TRANSL: 那種鹿會游泳，像水牛一樣。
This kind of deer swims, like cows.

S.FORM: o: bazae'en ila komoSa' kama langoy ray ralom wa'ae'.
S.TRANSL: 聽說，會游泳的鹿，
It's heard that the swimming deer.

S.FORM: o: hiwa'en ka kaeh'oen.
S.TRANSL: 如果鋸掉牠的角，
(If) the horn is sawed off,

S.FORM: so: senge:en noka pinobae:ah.
S.TRANSL: 然後如果泡在酒裡，
(and) soaked in wine,

S.FORM: o: pa'oSa'en ka 'iyo'.
S.TRANSL: 加一些藥，
(and) medicine added,

S.FORM: he ra'oeoen noka mae'iyaeh komoSa: isaza 'am hinghae'en soiti'.
S.TRANSL: （但是）要喝少量（一半以上就可以）。
One should drink moderately (a bit more than a half).

S.FORM: kayzaeh okik rikrika.
S.TRANSL: 以免身體發燒。
to avoid (your body) heating up.

S.FORM: o: 'aehae' naehaen koSa'en kasikiray a: koko:ol ka wa'ae' nakhara ra'oeen koSa' 'am rikrika.
S.TRANSL: 有另外一種山鹿，那種酒喝了更熱。
Another kind of wild deer, it's hotter if you drink (that).

S.FORM: o: 'aehae' naehaen sinraehoe' isaa yao ma' aw 'oka' ila sekela' atomalan isaa 'aehae' naehaen ka sinraehoe.
S.TRANSL: 有另外一種鹿我不太熟悉，
Another kind of deer I'm really not familiar with

S.FORM: pinobae:aeh ila ka pino pinobae:aeh ki 'iyo' ila hiza kita' ila ka 'iyo' mita' hamez.
S.TRANSL: 泡在酒裡，然後加一些藥，
Then soaked in wine and mixed with medicine.

S.FORM: ka ki kita' ka mae'iyaeh noka tatini' kasi'aelen a ka korkoring kasi'aelen ka minkoringan kasi'aelen o: 'iyo' hamez okik hinghae'.
S.TRANSL: 老人小孩可以吃，但婦女喝的藥不太一樣。
It can be taken by old people and by children. But the medicine added into women's drink is not the same.

S.FORM: ah so: noka hiza ka kamanra:an mita' pakwa'isan ka basang mita'.
S.TRANSL: 男性喝的藥可以使身體強壯。
The medicine mixed in men's drinks was supposed to make the body strong.

S.FORM: mita' ma 'okik hinghae' ka 'iyo' ka pa'oSa' hamez nak'isaza.
S.TRANSL: 那種飲料放的藥物不同。
The medicine mixed in that drink is not the same.

S.FORM: ay hayza' paskilkilo' ila hani.
S.TRANSL: 啊，有一隻生了。
There's one that gave birth.

S.FORM: 'aehae' ila kahiya'.
S.TRANSL: 一隻，昨天生的。
One. Yesterday.

S.FORM: ay paskilkilo' paskilkilo' ila ka a koSa'en SayboSi: ila ila sinpanan ma isa ila paskilkilo' 'aehae'.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻生了，總共有六隻了。
One gave birth to six cubs yesterday.

S.FORM: 'ihi' ay hiza ma' isaa kay kayzaeh atomalan koSa'en rpa ila.
S.TRANSL: 若加一點藥材就很好。
It would be good to add (something).

S.FORM: e rpa' ila ka wa'is o:.
S.TRANSL: 是啊，會讓你更強壯。
Yes, it would make you stronger.

S.FORM: 'ihi' masaso' ka nisia manakwa ila.
S.TRANSL: 他說什麼？
What did he say?

S.FORM: hini 'am koSa' mita'.
S.TRANSL: 這是我們要講的。
This is what we (need to) talk about

S.FORM: a min'itol nak hini koSa'en ka ka kinashoeroe'an ka howaw.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣參選就是要找公職。
Running for elections is discovering (public) service.

S.FORM: kayzaeh nakhini'an sipanabih taiwan.
S.TRANSL: 在台灣講這個話題行嗎？
Is it all right to talk about this in Taiwan?

S.FORM: nakhini'an sipnabih nakhara 'oka' ka howaw mina.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣的 ... ... 沒什麼意思。
There is really nothing meaningful with elections like this.

S.FORM: hini kano' atomal ila nakhini'an o:.
S.TRANSL: It really is. For what is this thing?

S.FORM: 'oka' ka howaw.
S.TRANSL: 沒什麼意思。
Nothing (meaningful).

S.FORM: mita' howaw 'ita' kasikiray 'os'osoan o: hita' hayza' ka wa'is nom maehraehraeng ka 'inakhiza.
S.TRANSL: 我們在山上作農夫的，（沒）資格講這些話題。
As farmers living in the mountains, we (don't) have the capability to discuss with them things like that.

S.FORM: na wa'is o: nakhini hini koSa'en ila min'itol ka ka patahoeki'in.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣的人有能力登記參選民代。
(People like this) have the ability to run for office.

S.FORM: 'a'aringan kakhayza'an mita' koSa'en noka tatini' tabin haysani.
S.TRANSL: 我們老人家從以前到現在對選舉一直沒什麼問題。
Since the past until now, we old people have never had any problem with elections.

S.FORM: 'ana min'itol hia' kita' makakreng no matawaw min'itol mita' ma' kaela'haengen.
S.TRANSL: 無論誰參選，只要認真做事，我們都會支持。
Whoever is elected, as long as they work diligently, we will also support him."

S.FORM: 'oka'ila o: haysani raamen ila nakhini koSa'en kil moto:.
S.TRANSL: 現在我們都知道登記參選的人都要跟客家人競爭。
Now we know that whoever runs will have to compete with Hakka candidates."

S.FORM: So: min'itol ma' noka a moto: nasia money(ita'.
S.TRANSL: (目前缺漏)
(It is missing presently)
